seoTitle: Pirie East vs Pleasant Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pirie East and Pleasant Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pirie East vs Pleasant Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pirie East and Pleasant Park.
heading: Pirie East vs Pleasant Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pirie East, South Australia and Pleasant Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pirie East has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Pleasant Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pirie East or Pleasant Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pirie East has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Pleasant Park scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pirie East scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Pleasant Park scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pirie East or Pleasant Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pirie East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
